backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, implementing user profiles, blog posts, contact messages, and grievances with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the redesign of the Home page CTA section to a golden yellow full-width block with dark navy heading, three CTA buttons, and trust badges, with high confidence and test ID REQ-37.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with full SEO metadata (Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data) for YMW Compliance Services, targeting business registration and compliance services in India.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with lazy-loaded page routes, a dark navy Layout wrapper with Navigation/Footer/FloatingCTA/ConsultationPopup, and React Query/ThemeProvider providers.
frontend/src/components/Card.tsx: Simple reusable card component applying the civic-card style class with optional hover cursor and className override support.
frontend/src/components/ConsultationPopu: A timed modal popup (shown after 5 seconds, once per session) that collects user info and service interest to submit a free consultation request, displaying a success state with reference ID on completion.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCTA.tsx: A fixed bottom-right floating action button group with WhatsApp chat and phone call links, each showing a tooltip label on hover.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, support links, and contact details (address, phone, email), including a copyright line.
frontend/src/components/FreeConsultation: A full-page section with a consultation request form (name, phone, service, city) that submits via mutation and shows a success state with a reference ID on completion.
A full-screen centered loading spinner component used as a fallback during lazy-loaded route or component transitions.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop nav links, a phone number, a CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu with secondary links.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible dialog modal that prompts new users to enter their name and email, saving the profile via a mutation before proceeding.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, blog posts, contact messages, grievances, and consultation requests, wrapping actor calls with query/mutation patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with a navy/gold dark theme using CSS custom properties, and defines reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a Tailwind class merging helper (cn) and two timestamp formatting functions that convert nanosecond bigint values to human-readable date strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component displaying company stats, core values, and team members for YMW Compliance Services, with a scroll-to-consultation CTA and a FreeConsultationSection at the bottom.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays blog posts from the backend with expandable content, loading skeletons, and empty/error states, followed by a FreeConsultationSection.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a hero section, contact info cards (phone, email, address, hours), and a form that submits messages via the useSubmitContactMessage mutation, showing a success state with a reference ID on completion.
frontend/src/pages/Grievance.tsx: Grievance submission page with a step-by-step info panel and a form (name, email, category, description) that submits via the useSubmitGrievance mutation, displaying a reference number on success.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero consultation form, featured services grid, stats bar, company strengths section, and WhatsApp/call CTAs, using the useSubmitConsultationRequest mutation and UTM source tracking.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services listing page that renders a grid of 15 service cards (each with icon, badge, description, and feature list) along with a FreeConsultationSection at the bottom.
frontend/src/pages/Signup.tsx: Authentication page using Internet Identity; handles login/logout, auto-registers new users via useSignUp, and shows a profile setup modal when no profile exists, with loading and authenticated profile display states.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMedia.tsx: Renders a Social Media page displaying cards for six platforms (X, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, GitHub) with icons, follower counts, descriptions, and external links, followed by a free consultation section.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), a navy/gold color palette with civic aliases, oklch-based semantic color tokens, custom shadows, and plugins for animations, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 19) for the YMW Compliance Services multi-page React site, documenting existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and the color/design system.
